---
title: "147: Duke, UNC, NBA Draft"
date: "2025-06-22"
categories:
  - gtUtils
  - gt_indicator_boxes
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Code"
editor: visual
---

### Load data

```{r load-data, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(rlang)
library(cbbplotR)

unc_first_rounders <- tibble::tribble(
  ~row, ~player,              ~year, ~round, ~pick, ~games,
  2,   "Day'Ron Sharpe",      2021,     1,    29, 29,
  3,   "Cole Anthony",        2020,     1,    15, 22,
  5,   "Cameron Johnson",     2019,     1,    11, 62,
  6,   "Nassir Little",       2019,     1,    25, 36,
  7,   "Coby White",          2019,     1,     7, 35,
  8,   "Tony Bradley",        2017,     1,    28, 38,
  10,   "Justin Jackson",      2017,     1,    15, 118,
  11,   "Brice Johnson",       2016,     1,    25, 148, 
  14,   "P.J. Hairston",       2014,     1,    26, 71,
  15,   "Reggie Bullock",      2013,     1,    25, 100, 
  16,   "Harrison Barnes",     2012,     1,     7, 75,
  17,   "John Henson",         2012,     1,    14, 109,
  18,   "Kendall Marshall",    2012,     1,    13, 73, 
  19,   "Tyler Zeller",        2012,     1,    17, 117,
  20,   "Ed Davis",            2010,     1,    13, 61,
  21,   "Wayne Ellington",     2009,     1,    28, 115,
  23,   "Tyler Hansbrough",    2009,     1,    13, 142,
  24,   "Ty Lawson",           2009,     1,    18, 105,
  26,   "Brandan Wright",      2007,     1,     8, 37, 
  28,   "Raymond Felton",      2005,     1,     5, 101,
  29,   "Sean May",            2005,     1,    13, 77,
  30,   "Rashad McCants",      2005,     1,    14, 98,
  31,   "Marvin Williams",     2005,     1,     2, 36,
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(team = "UNC")

duke_first_rounders <- tibble::tribble(
  ~row, ~player,              ~year, ~round, ~pick, ~games, 
  2,  "Jared McCain",        2024,     1,    16, 36,
  3,  "Dereck Lively II",    2023,     1,    12, 34,
  4,  "Dariq Whitehead",     2023,     1,    22, 28,
  5,  "Paolo Banchero",      2022,     1,     1, 39,
  6,  "AJ Griffin",          2022,     1,    16, 39,
  8,  "Wendell Moore Jr.",   2022,     1,    26, 88,
  9,  "Mark Williams",       2022,     1,    15, 62, 
  10,  "Jalen Johnson",       2021,     1,    20, 13,
  14,  "RJ Barrett",          2019,     1,     3, 38,
  15,  "Cam Reddish",         2019,     1,    10, 36,
  16,  "Zion Williamson",     2019,     1,     1, 33,
  17,  "Grayson Allen",       2018,     1,    21, 142, 
  18,  "Marvin Bagley III",   2018,     1,     2, 33,
  19,  "Wendell Carter Jr.",  2018,     1,     7, 37,
  21,  "Harry Giles",         2017,     1,    20, 26,
  23,  "Luke Kennard",        2017,     1,    12, 73,
  24,  "Jayson Tatum",        2017,     1,     3, 29,
  25,  "Brandon Ingram",      2016,     1,     2, 36,
  26,  "Tyus Jones",          2015,     1,    24, 39,
  27,  "Jahlil Okafor",       2015,     1,     3, 38,
  28,  "Justise Winslow",     2015,     1,    10, 39,
  29,  "Rodney Hood",         2014,     1,    23, 67,
  30,  "Jabari Parker",       2014,     1,     2, 35,
  32,  "Mason Plumlee",       2013,     1,    22, 141,
  33,  "Miles Plumlee",       2012,     1,    26, 135,
  34,  "Austin Rivers",       2012,     1,    10, 34, 
  35,  "Kyrie Irving",        2011,     1,     1, 11,
  37,  "Nolan Smith",         2011,     1,    21, 143,
  38,  "Gerald Henderson",    2009,     1,    12, 103,
  40,  "JJ Redick",           2006,     1,    11, 139,
  41,  "Shelden Williams",    2006,     1,     5, 139,
  43,  "Luol Deng",           2004,     1,     7, 37
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(team = "Duke")



first_rounders <- dplyr::bind_rows(unc_first_rounders, duke_first_rounders)
```

### 1st round picks

```{r nba-tbl, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

all_picks <- 1:30
all_years <- 2004:2024

all_combos <- base::expand.grid(year = all_years, pick = all_picks)

first_rounders <- dplyr::bind_rows(unc_first_rounders, duke_first_rounders)

df_marks <- first_rounders |>
  dplyr::filter(year %in% all_years, pick %in% all_picks) |>
  dplyr::select(year, pick, team) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    value = dplyr::if_else(team == "UNC", 1L, 0L, missing = NA_integer_)
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(-team)


result_long <- all_combos |>
  dplyr::left_join(df_marks, by = c("year", "pick"))


result_wide <- result_long |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from  = pick,
    values_from = value,
    names_prefix = "pick_"
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(year)




### custom header
key_info <- tibble::tibble(
  color = c("#003087", "#56a0d3"),
  label = c("Duke (32)", "UNC (23)")
)

key_html <- key_info |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    key_item = glue::glue(
      "<div style='display: flex; align-items: center; margin-right: 15px;'>
            <span style='display: inline-block; margin-right: 5px; width: 15px; height: 15px; background-color: {color};'></span>
            <span style='font-size:12px; vertical-align:20%'>{label}</span>
          </div>"
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::pull(key_item) |>
  paste(collapse = ' ')

custom_header <- glue::glue(
  "<div style='display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;'>
      <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/i/teamlogos/ncaa/500/150.png'
       style='height: 45px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
      <div style='flex-grow:1; margin-left: 30px; margin-right: 30px'>
        <span style='display: block; font-weight: bold; text-align: center; font-size: 24px;'>First Round NBA
        Draft Picks Since 2004
                <div style='margin-bottom: 5px; display: flex; justify-content: center;
                align-items: center;'>{key_html}</div>
      </div>
      <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/i/teamlogos/ncaa/500/153.png'
       style='height: 60px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
    </div>
    <br>"
)


## table 
result_wide |>
  dplyr::rename_with(~ stringr::str_remove(., "^pick_"), .cols = dplyr::starts_with("pick_")) |>
  dplyr::arrange(-year) |>
  gt::gt() |>
  gtUtils::gt_indicator_boxes(key_columns = c("year"),
                              color_yes = "#56a0d3", color_no = "#003087",
                              color_na = "#e1e1e1", border_color = "black",
                              border_width = ".75",
                              box_width = "14", box_height = "14") |>
  gtUtils::gt_theme_gtutils() |>
  gt::tab_source_note(
    source_note =
      gt::html(
        "<hr>
        <b>Total first round picks from</b>: 2004 to 2010: UNC (9), Duke (4) |
        2011 to 2024: Duke (28), UNC (14)<br>
        <b>Longest drought without first round pick</b>: Duke, two seasons (2007, 2008) |
        UNC: three seasons (2022 to 2024)<br>
        First round of NBA draft expanded to 30 picks in 2004, however, the Minnesota Timberwolves forfeited their first round pick in 2004.<br>
        <hr>Data from Stathead and sports-reference.com, theme via {gtUtils} | Table by Chris at Bless your Chart | June 22, 2025</b>"
      )
  ) |>
  gt::cols_add(
    `14.5` = "",
    .after = `14`
  ) |>
  gt::cols_label(
    year = "Year",
    `14.5` = ""
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_add_divider(columns = c(year), sides = "right",
                           color = "black") |>
  gt::tab_spanner(columns = c(2:15), label =
                    gt:::md("Lottery Picks")) |>
  gt::tab_style(
    locations = gt::cells_column_spanners(),
    style = gt::cell_text(
      font = gt::google_font("Signika Negative"),
      weight = 850,
      size = gt::px(15)
    )
  ) |>
  gt::tab_style(
    locations = gt::cells_source_notes(),
    style = gt::cell_text(
      font = gt::google_font("Signika Negative"),
      size = gt::px(11.5),
      weight = 350
    )
  ) |>
  gt::tab_style(
    style = list(
      gt::cell_text(font = gt::google_font("Signika Negative"),
                    size = gt::px(12.5),
      )
    ),
    locations = gt::cells_body(
      columns = c(year)
    )
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(columns = `30`, rows = 21,
                              fill = "lightpink") |>
  gt::tab_header(title = gt::html(custom_header)) |>
  gtUtils::gt_border_grid(color = "black",
                          weight = 0.5,
                          include_labels = FALSE) |>
  gtUtils::gt_border_bars_bottom(c("#003087", "#56a0d3", "#BBD9ED")) -> du

gtUtils::gt_save_crop(
  du,
  file = "duke_unc_nba.png",
  whitespace = 50,
  bg = "#FFFDF5"
)

du
```

### 

### 

### 

###
